name: Nana Mcnally's Rhubarb Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups sugar, white, brown or mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease a 9-inch x 12-inch baking pan.
Cream together the sugar, butter, egg, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Add flour, baking soda, salt, and milk (or buttermilk) to the mixture; mix until just combined.
Fold in the chopped rhubarb.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
Bake for 1 hour.
Combine topping ingredients of sugar, cinnamon, coconut, and nuts if using.
Sprinkle over baked cake before serving.
